reasons: Tigreal can pull and stun enemies into one area, giving Xavier a clear window to cast Mystic Field or Dawning Light.
Tigreal provides frontline engage after starting the combo, so Xavier can follow from safer range with less exposure.

proof.summary: Tigreal groups and controls enemies, while Xavier follows from range with immobilize, poke, or Dawning Light burst.
worksBestWhen: Xavier is already in range before Tigreal commits.
Tigreal catches multiple enemies or a priority carry.
Xavier saves Dawning Light for the real grouped-control window.
failureCases: Xavier casts too early before enemies are grouped.
Tigreal's channel is interrupted before the pull or stun finishes.

reasons: Atlas can drag chained enemies to a chosen location, giving Xavier a predictable target area for Mystic Field and Dawning Light.
Atlas provides frontline engage while Xavier plays behind the fight and focuses on skill placement.

proof.summary: Atlas creates a forced-position setup with Fatal Links, and Xavier follows with long-range control or burst into the dropped enemy group.
worksBestWhen: Atlas catches enemies before Xavier casts his major cooldowns.
Xavier waits for the drag location before firing Dawning Light.
Atlas drops enemies in Xavier's skill line.
failureCases: Atlas catches only one low-value target.
Xavier fires before Atlas finishes the second phase.
Enemies use Purify, immunity, or disengage after the drop.

reasons: Minotaur gives Xavier both frontline cover and teamfight crowd control, supporting Xavier's safe-casting style.
Xavier can follow Minotaur's knock-up/control with Mystic Field or Dawning Light while staying behind the frontline.

proof.summary: Minotaur protects the front and creates control windows, giving Xavier room to cast repeated poke and follow-up burst.
worksBestWhen: Minotaur positions between Xavier and enemy divers.
Xavier follows after Minotaur starts the control window.
Xavier keeps a safe casting angle behind the frontline.
failureCases: Minotaur engages too far forward and leaves Xavier open.
Xavier is flanked from the side.
Xavier casts without waiting for Minotaur's setup.

reasons: Lolita protects Xavier from projectile pressure while he positions for poke and long-range damage.
Lolita can also create a stun window that Xavier can follow with long-range skills.

proof.summary: Lolita protects Xavier's casting position and can create a follow-up stun window for Xavier's long-range skills.
worksBestWhen: Lolita plays near Xavier during siege or objective fights.
Xavier uses the protection to cast safely.
Xavier follows Lolita's control window from range.
failureCases: Xavier is positioned outside Lolita's protection angle.

reasons: Mathilda gives Xavier a reposition option when enemies dive him, helping him keep the distance needed to cast.
Mathilda's shield support helps Xavier survive long enough to continue his poke cycle.

proof.summary: Mathilda gives Xavier shield and reposition support so he can reset spacing and continue casting.
worksBestWhen: Mathilda saves Guiding Wind for Xavier's danger window.
Xavier uses the dash defensively to reset distance.
Xavier keeps line-of-sight for follow-up spells.
failureCases: Mathilda uses the field before Xavier is threatened.
Hard crowd control catches Xavier before he can reposition.
